message:
fix(lab): reject NaN/Infinity in cancellation probability validation

Scenario validation now checks p.is_finite() before the range check
on cancellation probability. Previously, NaN would pass the range
check (NaN is not contained in any range) and produce a validation
error, but Infinity would be caught by the range check with a
misleading "must be in [0.0, 1.0]" message. The is_finite() guard
rejects both upfront.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
